title: CRECIENDO JUNTOS - 211info
text: LATINO NETWORK CRECIENDO JUNTOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community Education Workers (promotores de educación) conduct home visits for low-income families, families of color, and English language learners. In addition to home visits, promotores facilitate school-based, culturally responsive parent-child workshops. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Low-income Latinos with children ages 0-6 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 283-6881 Sandy Gongora [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Home Based Parenting Education * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS AL KINDER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS APRENDEMOS EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLEGIO DE PADRES/PARENTS COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ESCALERA EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ESCALERA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PADRINOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SOÑANDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UNIDOS FOR OREGON LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALING INITIATIVE LEGAL SERVICES - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CONEXIONES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NINTH GRADE COUNTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - P3 COORDINATORS UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
